steps.title: Check current flatcar-container-linux deployment
steps.description:
Verify your flatcar-container-linux version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux
helm list -n flatcar-container-linux 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working flatcar-container-linux installation.

steps.title: Review flatcar-container-linux configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant flatcar-container-linux configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux
kubectl get configmap -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flatcar-container-linux
```
## Current situation

OVHcloud is powered by OpenStack (for the virtual machines) but there is no documentation to show how to import and use Flatcar OpenStack images on OVH.

## Impact

It's "hard" to get Flatcar running on OVH.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [RFE] OVHcloud documentation
steps.description:
Hi, we use flatcar+terraform on OVH for quite some time.

Here our implementation working in production
```terraform
resource "openstack_images_image_v2" "flatcar" {
  for_each = var.os_image

  name             = "Flatcar ${each.value["arch"]} - ${each.value["version"]} ${each.value["release_channel"]}"
  region           = var.region
  image_source_url =

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Upgrade flatcar-container-linux to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade flatcar-container-linux:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade flatcar-container-linux flatcar-container-linux/flatcar-container-linux --namespace flatcar-container-linux
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux
helm list -n flatcar-container-linux
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux
kubectl get events -n flatcar-container-linux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[RFE] OVHcloud documentation" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Hi, we use flatcar+terraform on OVH for quite some time.

Here our implementation working in production
```terraform
resource "openstack_images_image_v2" "flatcar" {
  for_each = var.os_image

  name             = "Flatcar ${each.value["arch"]} - ${each.value["version"]} ${each.value["release_channel"]}"
  region           = var.region
  image_source_url =

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with flatcar-container-linux installed or the issue environment reproducible.
